front: Movement: German Romantic art movement that sought to revive the religious nature of early Renaissance painters like Raphael
Movement: revived fresco painting to reinstill medieval spirit; named for their long hair and biblical clothing
Movement: Goethe criticized this movement as "retrograde"
Movement: also known as / prompted on the Brotherhood of St. Luke (Lukasbund)
Movement: key members include Johann Friedrich Overbeck and Peter von Cornelius
Movement: Raphael's early works were the primary artistic model for this movement
